displayName: NBD Pro — Claude daily token budget exceeded

documentation.content: A user has exceeded their daily Anthropic token budget in claudeProxy. Normal for heavy power users; investigate if the same uid trips this repeatedly or multiple uids trip it at once (= possible credential stuffing).

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND resource.labels.service_name="claudeProxy" AND jsonPayload.message="claudeProxy error" OR textPayload:"Daily AI budget exceeded"
